summary: Master Augustin and his student Elric Mervinger are engaged in a high-stakes battle against a powerful demon known as the Vicious Beast. Elric has the ability to consume demons' seals, which can grant him immense power, but this also makes him a target for others who seek to exploit his abilities. As they fight against the Vicious Beast, they must also contend with the consequences of their own secrets and motivations.
key_moments: Elric discovers that Master Augustin knows about his secret ability to consume demons' seals
The Vicious Beast is introduced as a powerful demon that Elric and Master Augustin are fighting against
Elric struggles with the moral implications of absorbing the Vicious Beast's seal, which could grant him immense power but also put him at risk
